rule_metadata.name: RagnarLocker
rule_metadata.author: @bartblaze
rule_metadata.description: Identifies RagnarLocker ransomware unpacked or in memory.

rules.rule_text:
rule RagnarLocker
{
	meta:
		id = "5066KiqBNrcicJGfWPfDx5"
		fingerprint = "fd403ea38a9c6c269ff7b72dea1525010f44253a41e72bf3fce55fa4623245a3"
		version = "1.0"
		creation_date = "2020-07-01"
		first_imported = "2021-12-30"
		last_modified = "2021-12-30"
		status = "RELEASED"
		sharing = "TLP:CLEAR"
		source = "BARTBLAZE"
		author = "@bartblaze"
		description = "Identifies RagnarLocker ransomware unpacked or in memory."
		category = "MALWARE"
		malware = "RAGNAR LOCKER"
		malware_type = "RANSOMWARE"
		mitre_att = "S0481"

	strings:
		$ = "RAGNRPW" ascii wide
		$ = "---END KEY R_R---" ascii wide
		$ = "---BEGIN KEY R_R---" ascii wide

	condition:
		any of them
}
